question: Is this stock deeply off its 52-week high (turnaround pattern)?
Is this stock's RSI(14) oversold?
Does Williams %R confirm the stock is oversold?
Is the Stochastic oscillator showing oversold conditions?
Is the price trading below its lower Bollinger Band?
Is the price at or below a computed support level?
Is this stock still cheap on a growth-adjusted basis despite the drawdown?
Does the drawdown look cyclical/sentiment-driven rather than a structural business breakdown?
Is this an established company by market cap?
Does this company have healthy gross margins?
Is this company operating-profit positive?
Is this company net-profit positive (already positive cashflow at the bottom line)?
pass_threshold: Net profit margin > 0 - RETIRED AS A SCORE 2026-07-07; now enforced as a Stage-0 scan gate on every archetype before a candidate ever reaches this rubric

question: Is this company generating a healthy return on equity?
Is this company generating a healthy return on assets?
Is this company still paying a dividend through the drawdown?
Has this company's EPS trend been improving over the last 2-4 quarters?
pass_threshold: most-recent actual EPS > earliest-of-window actual EPS

question: Does this company's balance sheet/leverage look reasonable for its sector?
pass_threshold: judgment call - no direct debt filter exists

question: Has momentum (MACD histogram) turned positive in the last ~2 weeks?
pass_threshold: MACD histogram crosses from <=0 to >0 within trailing ~10 sessions

question: Has the price reclaimed a key moving average?
Has a new uptrend started forming (Aroon Oscillator turned positive)?
Is the trend actually strengthening
Is there real buying accumulation (elevated volume specifically on up days)?
pass_threshold: Relative volume(30d) > 1.3 AND close > open that day

question: Has RSI recovered back above the oversold line after dipping below it?
pass_threshold: RSI(14) crosses from <30 to >=30 within the trailing window

question: Did the most recent reported quarter beat the EPS estimate?
Is the thesis safe from being re-priced by an earnings surprise in the next 2 weeks?
pass_threshold: no earnings report within +/-14 days of today

question: Does this company's sector/theme have a genuine multi-year tailwind (not just a bounce)?
Is there a real catalyst or inflection point (new leadership/restructuring/product cycle) rather than "waiting for the same thing to eventually work"?
(Growth compounders only) Does this stock clear both "cheap growth" and "high quality" together?
pass_threshold: PEG < 1.5 AND ROE > 15% (partial credit if only one clears)

question: Is this stock liquid enough to easily enter/exit a position of this account's typical size?
pass_threshold: average_volume / float above an approximate turnover threshold

question: Would buying this avoid adding to an already-large position in this name or sector?
pass_threshold: ticker not already held in the account

question: Is volatility elevated (real risk being priced) without being at distressed-debt extremes?
Would this position fit the account's few-trades-a-quarter high-conviction style without needing active monitoring?
pass_threshold: holistic synthesis judgment - no data input at all

question: Is this company the top-tier / dominant leader in its specific market domain - or at least a solid niche leader - durable enough to hold through a full 10-year cycle regardless of near-term volatility?
pass_threshold: dominant #1/#2 or solid niche/#3-4 leader -> qualifies (proceeds to scoring); sub-scale/commoditized/easily-disrupted -> DISQUALIFIED outright
